allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total services: {len\(d\)}'\); print\(f'Fuel: {len\([s for s in d if s[\\"type\\"]==\\"fuel_station\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'Mechanics: {len\([s for s in d if s[\\"type\\"]==\\"mechanic\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'Tire: {len\([s for s in d if s[\\"type\\"]==\\"tire_shop\\"]\)}'\); print\(f'Car Wash: {len\([s for s in d if s[\\"type\\"]==\\"car_wash\\"]\)}'\)")
